_comment: Training hyperparams for exp_010 GRPO v2 — DSMLP overnight Run 2 (v2). Run 1 stalled (full-196, no vLLM, ~67% steps had dead gradient). Run 2 v1 plan was strict-70 + 4096 tokens but per-step was still ~10min on HF generate → 23h ETA. Run 2 v2 switches to vLLM-backed rollouts (colocate, fp16 base, no BnB) to bring per-step to ~3-4min. ETA ~9-10h, fits 12h container. See notes.md.

reward._note: Format reward max = 0.225. Granular scoring ensures variance even when correctness is uniform across the 4 stochastic rollouts.
